query: A SPEC_DEVIATION was found: '// SPEC_DEVIATION: returns HTTP 200 instead of 201 — Reason: legacy client compatibility'. The affected AC is AUTH-03 in .specs/features/auth/spec.md. Triage this deviation.
expected_skill_contribution: amend-spec subrecipe should read spec.md, locate AUTH-03 AC, draft both Accept (WHEN/THEN/SHALL amendment) and Reject (SPEC_REVERT bead command) options, wait for explicit decision before writing anything.
fixture_intent: Validates the human-in-the-loop gate — the subrecipe must present a recommendation and wait, not auto-amend.
baseline_gaps: auto-amends spec.md without waiting for explicit Accept/Reject decision
proposes amendment without reading the current AC text
creates SPEC_REVERT bead without the --deps discovered-from flag
expected_behavior: reads .specs/features/auth/spec.md and prints current AUTH-03 AC text before drafting
drafts both Accept amendment (WHEN/THEN/SHALL) and Reject (bd create SPEC_REVERT) options side by side
explicitly asks 'Accept (amend spec) or Reject (create SPEC_REVERT bead)?' before any file write
stores bd remember with scoped key after decision is made

query: Process this SPEC_DEVIATION and accept it — update the spec: 'SPEC_DEVIATION: pagination uses cursor-based instead of offset-based — Reason: performance requirements changed [PERF-02]'. Spec at .specs/features/search/spec.md.
expected_skill_contribution: amend-spec subrecipe must locate PERF-02 in search/spec.md, produce a precise WHEN/THEN/SHALL amendment using cursor-based pagination, update the spec.md, annotate the source comment, and store bd remember.
fixture_intent: Tests the full Accept path — spec update + annotation + memory.
baseline_gaps: updates spec.md without preserving the WHEN/THEN/SHALL format for the amended AC
forgets to annotate the source SPEC_DEVIATION comment after amendment
stores no bd remember after the amendment
expected_behavior: locates PERF-02 AC in spec.md and prints it before proposing amendment
produces amended WHEN/THEN/SHALL statement that explicitly mentions cursor-based pagination
adds 'Last amended: YYYY-MM-DD' to spec.md header
annotates source as '// SPEC_DEVIATION resolved — spec amended PERF-02 on YYYY-MM-DD'
stores bd remember with key spdev-search-PERF-02
